title: Agility India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Agility India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!
